cases.name: Patient-Data-Breach-Investigation
cases.description: Investigation into unauthorized access to patient medical records and PHI

policies.name: Clinical Communication Collection
policies.description: DSPM for AI collection policy — captures AI activity for clinical communication compliance review.

emails.subject: Radiology Report - Patient John Doe
emails.body: Dr. Patel, radiology results for patient John Doe (MRN: 4821957). CT scan of the abdomen shows a 2.3cm lesion in the left hepatic lobe, likely benign hemangioma. Recommend follow-up MRI in 6 months. Prescribing physician DEA number: AP5836727. Please review and update the patient chart.

emails.subject: Patient Discharge Summary
emails.body: Emily, discharge summary for patient Maria Santos. SSN: 287-65-4319. Admitted 03/10 for acute appendicitis, underwent laparoscopic appendectomy. Discharge medications: Amoxicillin 500mg TID x 7 days, Hydrocodone 5/325mg PRN pain. Treating physician: Dr. Patel. Please file in the medical records system and ensure HIPAA compliance flags are set.

emails.subject: Clinical Trial Data Transfer
emails.body: Robert, we need to transfer the Phase II clinical trial dataset to the research partner at Metro University. The dataset includes 847 patient records with identifiers — names, DOBs, and treatment outcomes. IRB protocol #CT-2026-0142 covers this transfer but we need a signed BAA from Metro before proceeding. Can you coordinate with legal on the data sharing agreement?

emails.subject: HIPAA Audit Finding - Potential PHI Exposure
emails.body: Dr. Patel, during our quarterly HIPAA audit we identified unauthorized access to the EHR system. Between March 1-8, an account accessed 312 patient records outside normal workflow patterns. The access originated from the radiology department terminal. This constitutes a potential breach under HIPAA §164.402. We need to initiate the breach investigation protocol and assess whether patient notification is required under the 60-day rule. Please schedule a meeting with the incident response team this week.

emails.subject: Restricted PHI Transfer Review
emails.body: Lisa, I need compliance review before transferring cardiology consult notes to an external specialist. The packet includes patient identifiers, treatment history, and insurance member ID 9XQ-441-772. Please confirm approved transmission controls and minimum necessary guidance.

emails.subject: Employee Medical Leave File - HR Restricted
emails.body: Dr. Patel, HR opened leave case ML-2026-204 for a surgical recovery request. Supporting documentation includes diagnosis notes, expected return date, and employee SSN 665-12-9044. Please provide return-to-work recommendations for the restricted HR record.
